faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in South Ozone Park?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in South Ozone Park typically ranges from $800 to $4,000, depending on the infestation severity, property size, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand all costs upfront before any work begins.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in my South Ozone Park home?
faqs.answer: Common termite indicators include hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows or doors, mud tubes on exterior walls, and small piles of wood-colored droppings. South Ozone Park's older wooden homes are particularly susceptible, so annual inspections are recommended to catch infestations early before extensive damage occurs.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in South Ozone Park?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in South Ozone Park are completed within 4-8 hours for an average-sized home, though larger properties or severe infestations may require additional time. Follow-up monitoring visits are typically scheduled 30, 60, and 90 days after initial treatment to ensure complete elimination and prevent re-infestation.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite warranties for South Ozone Park properties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive termite warranties for all South Ozone Park treatments, typically covering 1-5 years depending on the treatment type selected. Our warranties include free annual inspections and retreatment if termites return during the coverage period, protecting your investment and giving you complete peace of mind.
